title: Fused ratio + KL computation kernel
summary: Standalone fused ratio and negative-KL helper evaluated as a building block for larger PPO kernels.

representative_shapes: sub-millisecond ratio and KL helper workload

success_gate: Keep the helper experimental unless it wins either standalone or as a component of a larger fused kernel.

results.note: Standalone is slower due to Triton launch overhead at sub-0.1ms. Value is as building block for larger fused kernels.

notes: Normalized from the legacy task-card schema on 2026-04-03 to restore queue validation.
